name: Berry Delite Fruit Dip
recipeIngredient: 16 oz IMO Fat Free Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the IMO Fat Free Sour Cream, raspberry jam, honey, and grated lime rind.
2. If desired, add the lime juice.
3. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are incorporated.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for several hours to allow the flavors to blend together.
